# Lefamulin Acetate 相關新聞

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Lefamulin Acetate 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Lefamulin Acetate</strong> 目前有 <strong>28 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 10 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Lefamulin Acetate 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Xenleta is indicated for the treatment of community-acquired pneumonia (CAP) in adults when it is considered inappropriate to use antibacterial agents that are commonly recommended for the initial...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（10 個）：<ul>
<li>leishmaniasis, diffuse cutaneous（99.2%）</li>
<li>hyperamylasemia（99.1%）</li>
<li>polyclonal hyperviscosity syndrome（99.1%）</li>
<li>congenital analbuminemia（98.9%）</li>
<li>Mycoplasma pneumoniae pneumonia（98.8%）</li>
<li>blood group incompatibility（98.8%）</li>
<li>premalignant hematological system disease（98.7%）</li>
<li>staphylococcus aureus pneumonia（98.5%）</li>
<li>monoclonal gammopathy（98.5%）</li>
<li>hematological disease associated with an acquired peripheral neuropathy（98.4%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/lefamulin-acetate/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
